description.value:
Archetype

Your Armament Haki has grown dense and reliable. When you use Armament Haki, the benefits are improved:

  • The bonus damage increases to +1d8.
  • The physical resistance increases to 5.
  • The resistance bypass increases to your level (instead of 5).

Additionally, you can now enter Armament Haki as a free action once per round, rather than a 1-action activation.
description.gm: This feat makes Armament Haki nearly always-on in combat at the cost of a feat investment. The free action activation is the primary mechanical reward here — at level 6, players will often want to activate it at the start of every fight.
